title: Anohana: The Flower We Saw That Day
sourceNotes: Single-cour 11-episode series. Manga is a close tie-in adaptation running the same linear story with no distinct named arcs; complete at 13 chapters.

movies.title: Anohana the Movie: The Flower We Saw That Day
movies.note: Epilogue set a year after the TV series; new framing device (the group writing letters to Menma) around flashbacks to the show.
